title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.710 - Transportation, how provided
text:
162.710.  Transportation, how provided. — The district responsible for furnishing special educational services shall provide necessary transportation for all handicapped children residing within the district, including transportation to and from contracted day classes, notwithstanding the provisions of sections 162.621 and 167.231.
(L. 1973 H.B. 474 § 9) 
Effective 7-1-74
